text:
: Shravani Purnima / Raksha Bandhan Snan — First major royal bathing — all 13 Akharas participate
: Naga Panchami Snan — Naga Sadhus take the holy dip in a grand procession
: Shravani Amavasya Snan — Amavasya (new moon) bathing — ancestors honored
: Simhastha Purnima — Main Kumbh Snan (Maha Kumbh Snan) — THE most sacred bath — Jupiter in Leo + Full Moon. Missing this is considered a great loss for a devotee
: Bhadrapad Amavasya — Pitru Paksha Snan — Pitru Paksha begins — ancestors' souls liberated with Godavari bath
